commit.message:
fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: /p/:slug now renders proposal — was falling through to marketing homepage

The root entry point (index.tsx) only matched /proposal/:slug but all
proposal URLs are generated with /p/:slug (PROPOSAL_BASE constant).
Visiting /p/anything matched nothing, fell through to App which rendered
LandingPage — showing the TrueXpanse marketing homepage.

Fix: added /p/:slug pattern to the route match regex. Both /proposal/:slug
(legacy) and /p/:slug (current) now render ProposalViewPageInvoice with
the correct slug extracted.

commit.message:
Add error source highlighting, JSX insert commands, dev hot-reload notice

Feature #4: Better error display
- renderError now shows source code with the error line highlighted
- Parses line/column from error messages (e.g., "(3:5)")
- Shows 5-line context window around the error line
- Red highlight bar on the error line, line numbers in gutter

Feature #5: JSX insert commands (command palette)
- "Insert JSX block" — basic template with useState
- "Insert JSX component definition" — jsx:component:MyComponent template
- "Insert JSX block with useState + useEffect" — async data loading pattern
- Also added Notice on cache clear command

Feature #6: Dev hot-reload notification
- esbuild watcher writes .hotreload timestamp file on each deploy
- Plugin polls .hotreload every 2s via vault adapter
- Shows Obsidian Notice when a new build is detected:
  "React Renderer rebuilt — reload plugin or restart Obsidian to apply"

commit.message:
Add style reference img2img pipeline, mock mode indicator, forge screenshots

Style References (img2img) — full feature:
- New StyleReferenceService: resolves per-entity or global style references,
  with scope fallback chain (entity → global → none). Manages upload, delete,
  and resolution for portrait and building reference images.
- New style_references router: CRUD endpoints for managing reference images
  with multipart upload support.
- New StyleReference Pydantic model for request validation.
- ImageService: img2img branch — when a style reference exists, downloads the
  reference image (local URLs aren't reachable from Replicate), converts to
  PNG, and passes to the img2img model instead of txt2img.
- ModelResolver.resolve_img2img_model(): resolves bxclib2/flux_img2img with
  configurable strength, handles prompt_key differences (positive_prompt vs
  prompt) across models.
- ReplicateService: added prompt_key parameter for models that use
  "positive_prompt" instead of "prompt".
- Frontend: VelgStyleReferenceUpload (drag-drop + click upload with preview),
  VelgStyleReferencePanel (settings page integration),
  VelgStyleReferenceModal (entity-level reference management).
- Frontend: StyleReferenceApiService singleton, types, icons (upload,
  imageReference).
- BaseApiService: added postFormData() for multipart uploads, delete() now
  accepts query params.
- Forge Darkroom: reference image upload fields for portrait and building
  styles integrated into Phase III.
- AI Settings Panel: style reference section added.
- Tests: 1,041 lines across router, service, model resolver, and API tests.

Mock Mode Indicator:
- Health endpoint returns forge_mock_mode flag from backend settings.
- AppStateManager: new mockMode signal, fetched on auth init.
- PlatformHeader: "MOCK" badge with warning-colored styling when active.

Other Changes:
- Forge router: admin-only POST /admin/regenerate-images/{simulation_id}
  endpoint for batch image regeneration.
- PromptTemplateResponse: field_validator coerces string entries in variables
  list to dicts for backwards compatibility.
- Migration 083: adds lore_image settings columns.
- How-to-Play screenshots: 35 images (AVIF + PNG) covering forge phases,
  events, chronicle, resonances, and agent memory.
- Screenshot automation script (scripts/screenshot-forge.mjs).
- MCP config: puppeteer → chrome-devtools.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(university): pagina studio ROCCO + migrate aggiornato

  📚 Materie (10 card con progress bar + link diretto a formule)

test(maze): test_grayscale_walls 期待値更新 + コントラスト保証テスト追加（maze_ssim_a2）

_wall_color() 新formula (v_min=40, v_max=175, Δv≥80) に合わせて
既存テストの期待値を更新し、全輝度範囲でコントラスト保証を検証する新テストを追加。

変更:
  - test_wall_color_black: rgb(80,80,80) → rgb(40,40,40)  (v_min=40)
  - test_wall_color_white: rgb(220,220,220) → rgb(175,175,175)  (v_max=175, Δv=80保証)
  - test_wall_color_mid:   rgb(110,110,110) → rgb(107,107,107)  (40+int(135*0.5))
  - test_wall_color_range: 範囲 [80,220] → [40,175]
  - test_wall_color_contrast_guarantee: 新規追加 — 101輝度点で 255-v≥80 を検証

11/11 PASS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: v29.3 — cache-buster stable pour vidéo carousel (anti re-téléchargement)

PROBLÈME: resolveMediaUrl utilisait Date.now() qui change à chaque
rendu React. La vidéo basket recevait une URL différente toutes les 8s
(rotation carousel), forçant le navigateur à re-télécharger depuis zéro.
Résultat: écran noir permanent sur le slot vidéo.

FIX: useState(() => Date.now()) crée un timestamp STABLE au montage
du composant. Le ?v= reste identique entre les rotations, permettant
au navigateur de garder la vidéo en mémoire et de la jouer directement.

chore: gitignore all .md files except README.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.0.55: Fix plan summary not showing — strip ANSI codes before regex parse

Terraform outputs color escape sequences when -no-color is not passed.
The Plan summary regex was failing to match numbers wrapped in ANSI codes
like: Plan: \x1b[32m88\x1b[0m to add, ...

Strip all ESC[...m sequences before applying the regex.

commit.message:
Fix duplicate task creation by paginating Todoist task fetching

GetTasksAsync only fetched the first page of results, causing tasks
beyond the page limit to appear missing and be recreated on every sync.
Now loops through all pages using next_cursor until exhausted.

commit.message:
Add typed TensorProperties fields + single-pass _analyze_indices

TGR-2qq: Promote hot-path options to typed fields on TensorProperties:
- flat::Bool, is_covd::Bool, is_christoffel::Bool, vanishing::Bool
- Constructor infers from options Dict for backward compatibility
- set_flat!, is_flat, set_vanishing!, get_covd, unregister_covd! now use
  typed fields instead of Dict lookup
- set_flat! Christoffel loop uses tp2.is_christoffel instead of get()

TGR-0ah: Single-pass index analysis via _analyze_indices():
- Groups indices by (name, vbundle) once, returns (all, free, dummy_pairs)
- _normalize_dummies: 3 tree walks → 1 (indices + dummy_pairs + free_indices
  replaced by single _analyze_indices call)
- ensure_no_dummy_clash: 4 tree walks → 2 (one per expression instead of two)
- free_indices() and dummy_pairs() now delegate to _analyze_indices

commit.message:
Add resonance auto-processing scheduler, restructure How-to-Play to 28 sections

Backend — Resonance Auto-Processing:
- New ResonanceScheduler (backend/services/resonance_scheduler.py): asyncio
  background task that auto-processes due resonances every 60s. Uses admin
  supabase client (service_role, system actor pattern). Queries
  substrate_resonances WHERE status='detected' AND impacts_at <= now().
  Configurable via platform_settings: resonance_auto_process_enabled (bool),
  resonance_auto_process_interval_seconds (int).
- FastAPI lifespan handler (backend/app.py): starts scheduler on startup,
  cancels on shutdown via asynccontextmanager.

Frontend — How-to-Play Guide Restructure:
- Reorganized from 19 append-order sections to 28 sections in 4 categories:
  World (8), Competitive Play (10), Advanced Mechanics (5), Reference (5).
- Added 9 new guide sections: What is metaverse.center? (intro), Simulation
  Lore, The Multiverse Map, Bot Players, Agent Chat, Events & Reactions,
  Simulation Health, Social Trends & Campaigns, COMMS & Notifications.
- Each section has phase, title, narration, detail, readout, tip, and warning.
- TOC restructured with category groupings; default section changed to 'intro'.
- Added v2.6 changelog entry covering guide restructure and auto-processing.
- Rebuilt i18n: 3,160 localized strings (up from 2,563).

Documentation Updates:
- substrate-resonances.md v1.2: added Automatic Impact Processing section.
- feature-catalog.md v2.3: expanded tutorial entry (28 sections in 4
  categories), added J8 auto-processing scheduler, updated metrics.
- platform-architecture.md v2.1: added resonance auto-processing config keys.
- INDEX.md: updated version numbers for changed specs.
- llms.txt: added auto-processing mention to resonances entry.
- README.md: backend tests 866→912, i18n 2,563→3,160, How-to-Play description
  updated, v2.6 balance evolution expanded, platform admin features updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Round 80: 5-Layer Living Generative Entity architecture for AI agents

Replace flat personality strings with a cognitive 5-layer system:
- Temperament: base disposition, communication style, worldview
- Driving Force: motivation, curiosity, agency, internal tension
- Habit: persistent evolving patterns from interactions (localStorage)
- Generation: ephemeral session state (mood, goals, observations)
- Reflection: habit modification triggered by workflow completion/errors

New files: src/lib/reflection.ts (pattern detection, habit processing)
Modified: types.ts, agents.ts, prompts.ts, useStore.ts

feat(maze): MAZE-Q2 Xu-Kaplan可変セルサイズ実装（cmd_361k_a3）

Xu-Kaplan SIGGRAPH 2007 公式 S=W/(1-G) に基づく可変セルサイズを実装。
暗部=小セル（密）、明部=大セル（疎）で情報密度を最適化する。

## 変更点
- grid_builder.py: compute_cell_size_map() 追加、CellGrid に row_heights/col_widths フィールド追加
  - build_cell_grid/with_edges/with_texture に variable_cell_size=False パラメータ追加
  - G_min=W/S_min=0.50, G_max=0.98 でクリップ後 S=W/(1-G) → 正規化
- exporter.py: _compute_offsets() / 更新済み _cell_center() を追加
  - maze_to_svg(): 均一 cell_size 座標 → 累積和ベース x_offsets/y_offsets 座標に変更
  - maze_to_png(): to_px() を x_offsets/y_offsets インデックス参照に変更
- __init__.py: variable_cell_size=False パラメータ追加、MASTERPIECE_PRESET に variable_cell_size:True 追加
- tests/test_density_variable_cell_size.py: 16テスト追加（sums_to_one/bright_is_larger/svg/png/SSIM等）

## 品質ゲート
- 全テスト: 476 passed（既存460件リグレッションなし + 新規16件）
- SSIM: uniform vs variable = 0.9602（グラデーション画像 10×10グリッド）
- variable_cell_size=False がデフォルト（後方互換維持）

commit.message:
Add stone sound, remove AI fallback, verify bots enter pool

- Stone sound effect (Web Audio API) on every stone placement;
  human stones ~900 Hz, AI/opponent stones ~600 Hz, no external files
- Remove 35s AI fallback from matchmaking — bots always arrive within
  1–25s via dispatcher, so local AI substitute is no longer needed
- Pool-write failure and game-create failure now return to lobby instead
  of silently starting a computer game

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add OWASP security hardening + exploit regression tests + digest system

Security fixes (OWASP audit):
- Fix IDOR on MT accounts endpoint (auth before DB queries)
- Fix IDOR on user statements endpoint (ownership check)
- Gate /api/health diagnostics behind admin auth
- Add Secure flag to impersonate session cookie
- Fix timing attack on worker token (crypto.timingSafeEqual)
- Fix SWITCH_TOPIC socket handler clan membership bypass
- Add security headers (X-Frame-Options, HSTS, CSP, Referrer-Policy)
- Remove dangerouslySetInnerHTML XSS vector in admin digests
- Replace $queryRawUnsafe with parameterized $queryRaw

Exploit regression tests (30 tests):
- Analysis upgrade loophole, retroactive match, duplicate MT ticket
- Manual resolution bypass, win rate manipulation, UNVERIFIED bypass
- Combined attack vectors, price manipulation in matching

Also includes digest system refactor and admin UI updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use consistent position calculation across all queue operations

patient_added, step_out, and import_stash each used different logic to
calculate queue entry positions, causing collisions and incorrect
ordering. Unified all three to use nextPosition() which computes
max position across all entries + 1, ensuring unique positions and
correct ordering (new patients always go after stepped-out patients).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add agent comment commands to CLI

Adds ability for agents to add comments and view comments on their tasks.

New CLI Commands:
- agent-todo agent add-comment <task-id> <comment>
  Add a comment to a task assigned to the agent

- agent-todo agent comments <task-id>
  List all comments on a task

Changes:
- Added agentAddCommentCmd and agentListCommentsCmd to cli/cmd/agent.go
- Added AuthorName field to Comment struct in cli/cmd/task.go
- Updated CLI README with documentation for new commands
- Added examples in Quick Start section

Agents can now:
1. List their tasks: agent-todo agent tasks
2. Update status: agent-todo agent update-status <id> <status>
3. Add comments: agent-todo agent add-comment <id> "comment"
4. View comments: agent-todo agent comments <id>

Backend already had the endpoints, this just adds CLI commands to use them.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: bypass CloudFront for Python ingestion download URLs

getSignedUrl() returns a CloudFront URL when CF env vars are set.
The CloudFront distribution may not have a behavior for broll paths
(users/*/media/*/broll/*), causing 403 when Python tries to download.

Use promptDownload:true to force direct S3 presigned URL for the
internal Python service download — no need for CDN in server-to-server.

commit.message:
feat: 实现医学词库维护系统

## 新增功能

### 数据库层
- 新增 medical_vocabulary 表（医学词汇，121条初始数据）
- 新增 icd_codes 表（ICD疾病编码，14条初始数据）
- 新增 surgery_codes 表（手术编码，12条初始数据）

### 后端API
- 新增词库管理完整CRUD接口
- 实现相似词检测算法（编辑距离，阈值80%）
- 支持分类、专科、关键词多维度筛选
- 支持分页查询

### 前端页面
- 新增词库维护页面（VocabularyManagement.vue）
- 新增系统维护下拉菜单
- 实现词汇增删改查功能
- 实现相似词自动检测和提示
- 实现关键词标签化管理

### 工具脚本
- create_vocabulary_tables.py - 创建数据库表
- init_vocabulary_data.py - 初始化数据
- demo_vocabulary.py - 演示脚本
- vocabulary_manager.py - 词库管理工具

### 文档
- VOCABULARY_SYSTEM_DESIGN.md - 系统设计文档
- VOCABULARY_TESTING_GUIDE.md - 测试指南
- VOCABULARY_MAINTENANCE.md - 维护指南
- VOCABULARY_COMPLETION_SUMMARY.md - 完成总结

## 改进优化

### Mock模式改进
- 扩展医疗词库（新增骨科专业词汇）
- 改进症状和疾病识别
- 优化提示词（强调只提取不推测）

### 数据统计
- 医学词汇：121条（身体部位74条，症状16条，疾病22条，方位词9条）
- ICD编码：14条
- 手术编码：12条

repository.description: 一句话生成大师级海报、书籍封面、专辑封面和各类设计作品。无需懂PS、配色或艺术史，AI自动选择最佳风格（基于20位传奇海报设计师）。支持电影海报、读书笔记、公众号封面、小红书配图等。默认9:16竖版，完美适配社交媒体。包含AI提示词优化、风格对比、图生图转换功能。触发词："Mondo风格"、"书籍封

commit.message:
Bouton Copy to LLM + formatReport unique dans model.js

formatReport() dans model.js génère le texte — utilisé par le CLI
(console.log) et le bouton UI (clipboard). Plus de duplication.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: log WL-060 — recurring Cloudflare wrangler auth failure

5+ sessions lost to wrangler login opening browser with wrong account.
Permanent fix documented in CLAUDE.md and waste-log.md:
use CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN env var, never browser OAuth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
